headline: UBS and Cantor Fitzgerald Stay Positive on Block (XYZ)
summary: Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) is one of the 10 Best Fintech Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. On April 21, UBS reaffirmed its Buy rating on Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) with a price target of $90 on the stock. This update comes after the company’s third “On the Block” Q&A session, where the company’s leadership, including […]
